mapper.insert: insert into room_app_reminder (user_id, reservation_id, title, body, fire_time) values (#{userId}, #{reservationId}, #{title}, #{body}, #{fireTime})
mapper.select: select id, reservation_id as reservationId, title, body, fire_time as fireTime, is_read as isRead from room_app_reminder where user_id = #{userId} and is_read = '0' order by fire_time asc
mapper.update: update room_app_reminder set is_read = '1' where id = #{id} and user_id = #{userId}
